fields.why: Area height is part of the stable area geometry model.

log.why: Area height is part of the stable area geometry model.

fields.comment: Area height is part of the stable area geometry model. It maps to `targeting.areaOfEffect.height`. It is populated from the structured markdown label `Area Height`. Purpose: targeting.areaOfEffect.height exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. Populate it from the structured markdown field `Area Height`, after that field has been checked against canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `targeting.areaOfEffect.height`. The value type is `number`. This is optional or conditional in the runtime shape. Omit or leave empty only when this runtime/template layer intentionally treats the field as optional.
